title: Data retention
description: Control how long non-authoritative support data stays on this device. Cleanup runs automatically every day.

privacyAuditDays.label: Privacy-request evidence (days)
privacyAuditDays.help: Between {{min}} and {{max}} days; never shorter than operational audit history.

aiAuditDays.label: AI usage telemetry (days)
aiAuditDays.help: Between {{min}} and {{max}} days. Prompts and responses are not stored in this table.

syncedOutboxDays.label: Acknowledged sync rows (days)
syncedOutboxDays.help: Between {{min}} and {{max}} days. Pending, conflicted and failed work is always preserved.

validation.range: Enter a whole number between {{min}} and {{max}}.
validation.privacyFloor: Privacy-request evidence cannot be retained for less time than operational audit history.

preview.title: Cleanup preview
preview.description: Only rows older than the configured cutoff are eligible.
preview.error: The cleanup preview could not be loaded.

legalHold: Sales, fiscal documents, payments, cash sessions, inventory movements and linked customer transaction evidence are never deleted by this policy. Confirm local legal requirements before shortening a retention period.

confirm.title: Delete expired support data?
confirm.message_one: This permanently deletes {{count}} eligible row. Authoritative business records remain untouched.
confirm.message_other: This permanently deletes {{count}} eligible rows. Authoritative business records remain untouched.

toast.saveError: The retention policy could not be saved
toast.sweepError: Expired data could not be deleted
